findingDetails.title: The new usage wrapper presents an unconstrained dynamic script loader as an implementation pattern
findingDetails.evidence: The OVERVIEW recommends the documented loading patterns while loadScript(src) assigns an unconstrained caller value to script.src; the separate third-party reference demonstrates HTTPS allowlisting and SRI guidance.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Direct stabilization rereads confirmed the generic loader and the separate bounded counterexample; no untrusted executable caller is introduced by this documentation-only packet.
findingDetails.recommendation: State that src must be a trusted static/allowlisted HTTPS URL and point to integrity controls.

findingDetails.title: Post-completion follow-up presents remediated issues as still active
findingDetails.evidence: The follow-up still names a cookie contradiction and arbitrary-input loader although current resources distinguish non-sensitive cookies and validate HTTPS allowlisted hosts with SRI guidance.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Both named current resources were reread in stabilization; their counterevidence remains current and the stale summary remains unchanged.
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove resolved follow-ups or rewrite them to identify only current, cited debt.

findingDetails.title: Task and checklist evidence contracts overstate the evidence stored in their rows
findingDetails.evidence: Checked rows remain completion statements without the commands, output references, or replay pointers promised by their notation/protocol.
findingDetails.scopeProof: The packet-wide task/checklist evidence format remains unchanged; current-state claims are corroborated but historical/process claims are not replayable from rows.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add command/result or durable evidence pointers to checked rows, especially historical and process claims.

noveltyJustification: No new or refined finding survived the terminal maintainability pass. Novelty is bounded to stabilization evidence: durable packet-level maintenance mechanics were confirmed, all three P2 advisories were replayed unchanged, and existing R4 search debt was explicitly carried.
